name: gentyr
description: Autonomous AI engineering team for Claude Code. Agents, hooks, MCP servers, and guards that write, test, review, and ship code.

scripts.build:mcp: cd packages/mcp-servers && npm install --no-fund --no-audit && npm run build
scripts.build:playwright-helpers: cd packages/playwright-helpers && npm install --no-fund --no-audit && npm run build
scripts.build:window-recorder: [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ] && cd tools/window-recorder && swift build -c release || echo 'Window recorder build skipped (non-macOS)'
scripts.prepare: npm run build:mcp && npm run build:playwright-helpers && npm run build:window-recorder
